shots.title: Empty Lab Settling In
shots.camera: grounded first-person seated wide shot, nearly still with a slight breathing sway across the rows of dark iMacs toward the far blackboard
shots.action: The lab holds in quiet stillness as fluorescent ceiling light reveals black desks, sleeping screens, and the empty room stretching ahead.
shots.transition_goal: Establish the institutional space, solitude, and first-person presence before any movement of attention.
shots.voiceover_line: I came in early, before the room had decided to become a room again.

shots.title: Waiting Desks
shots.camera: slow first-person pan across desk rows at seated height, lingering on dark monitors and the far end of the room
shots.action: The camera drifts across the silent workstations and pauses as if counting the absence of everyone not yet there.
shots.transition_goal: Deepen the feeling of disconnection and underline that the room feels built for others.
shots.voiceover_line: The screens were dark, and every desk felt like it was waiting for someone else.

shots.title: Thoughts in the Fluorescent Quiet
shots.camera: first-person hold that slowly tilts and drifts toward the brighter side of the room, letting window light begin to pull the frame
shots.action: After a long still beat on the lab interior, attention shifts away from the dead screens toward the nearby window glow.
shots.transition_goal: Bridge the inward stillness of the lab to the outward pull of the window without an abrupt cut.
shots.voiceover_line: I sat with the noise in my head until the silence around me started to make sense.

shots.title: First Look Outside
shots.camera: grounded first-person medium-wide from inside the room, framed by the window edge and blind, looking down into the alley
shots.action: The wet alley and muted office facades come into view through the glass as the camera settles into a steady observational hold.
shots.transition_goal: Land the viewer in the exterior-facing perspective motivated by the previous interior drift.
shots.voiceover_line: When I finally looked up, the city outside was cold and wet and carrying on without me.

shots.title: Cold Clarity Hold
shots.camera: static first-person hold through the window with subtle natural handheld breathing, centered on the reflective alley and overcast light
shots.action: The frame remains steady on the damp pavement and narrow canyon of buildings, allowing the outside world to exist without interruption.
shots.transition_goal: Let the emotional release arrive through duration and stillness, ending on reflection rather than action.
shots.voiceover_line: Somehow that helped; not everything has to move fast to move forward.
